body_segments.original: Core Concept
body_segments.translated: بنیادی تصور

body_segments.original: The most brilliant AI solution is worthless if you can't sell it. Enterprise sales success requires understanding buyer personas, solving their three core challenges, and aligning pricing with measurable outcomes—not just building better technology.
body_segments.translated: سب سے بہترین AI حل بے قیمت ہے اگر آپ اسے بیچ نہیں سکتے۔ Enterprise sales کامیابی buyer personas کو سمجھنے، ان کے تین بنیادی چیلنجز کو حل کرنے، اور قیمت کو قابل پیمائش نتائج کے ساتھ ہم آہنگ کرنے کی ضرورت ہے—صرف بہتر ٹیکنالوجی بنانا نہیں۔

body_segments.original: Key Mental Models
body_segments.translated: اہم ذہنی ماڈلز

body_segments.original: **Six Selection Factors**: What enterprises actually prioritize: customization, partnership ecosystem, consultative approach, domain expertise, business-unit focus, and outcome-based pricing
body_segments.translated: **چھ Selection Factors**: enterprises دراصل کیا ترجیح دیتی ہیں: customization, partnership ecosystem, consultative approach, domain expertise, business-unit focus, اور outcome-based pricing

body_segments.original: **Three Core Challenges**: Integration complexity, limited technical expertise, and security vulnerabilities—solve these to become invaluable
body_segments.translated: **تین بنیادی چیلنجز**: Integration complexity, محدود technical expertise, اور security vulnerabilities—انہیں حل کریں تاکہ انمول بن سکیں

body_segments.original: **Gen AI Paradox**: 75%+ of companies adopted AI but see no earnings impact—creating massive opportunity for providers who deliver measurable outcomes
body_segments.translated: **Gen AI Paradox**: 75%+ کمپنیوں نے AI اپنایا لیکن کوئی کمائی اثر نہیں دیکھتے—ماپنے والے نتائج فراہم کرنے والے فراہم کنندگان کے لیے بڑا موقع بناتا ہے

body_segments.original: Critical Patterns
body_segments.translated: اہم پیٹرنز

body_segments.original: Tailor pitch to buyer persona: CFO (ROI, cost reduction), COO (efficiency, scale), CIO/CTO (integration, security), CEO (competitive advantage)
body_segments.translated: buyer persona کے مطابق pitch تیار کریں: CFO (ROI, cost reduction)، COO (efficiency, scale)، CIO/CTO (integration, security)، CEO (competitive advantage)

body_segments.original: Handle objections with data: "We tried AI before" → "75% saw no impact because they lacked outcome focus"
body_segments.translated: اعتراضات کو ڈیٹا کے ساتھ ہینڈل کریں: "ہم نے پہلے AI آزمایا" → "75% نے کوئی اثر نہیں دیکھا کیونکہ ان کے پاس outcome focus کی کمی تھی"

body_segments.original: Use outcome-based pricing: subscription, fixed-price, or gain-share—70%+ of enterprises prefer this over hourly rates
body_segments.translated: outcome-based pricing استعمال کریں: subscription, fixed-price, یا gain-share—70%+ enterprises اسے hourly rates پر ترجیح دیتے ہیں

body_segments.original: Follow implementation phases: Discovery (4-6 weeks) → Prototype (6-8 weeks) → Pilot (8-12 weeks) → Scale (3-6 months)
body_segments.translated: implementation phases کی پیروی کریں: Discovery (4-6 ہفتے) → Prototype (6-8 ہفتے) → Pilot (8-12 ہفتے) → Scale (3-6 مہینے)

body_segments.original: Build partnerships from day one: hyperscalers, LLM providers, vertical specialists, SaaS vendors
body_segments.translated: پہلے دن سے partnerships بنائیں: hyperscalers, LLM providers, vertical specialists, SaaS vendors

body_segments.original: Common Mistakes
body_segments.translated: عام غلطیاں

body_segments.original: Positioning as "cheapest option" when enterprises value outcomes over price
body_segments.translated: "سستا ترین آپشن" کے طور پر پوزیشننگ جب enterprises قیمت پر outcomes کو ترجیح دیتے ہیں

body_segments.original: Speaking technology to business buyers instead of business outcomes
body_segments.translated: بزنس buyers سے بزنس outcomes کے بجائے ٹیکنالوجی کی بات کرنا

body_segments.original: Using time-and-materials pricing when the market has shifted to outcome-based models
body_segments.translated: time-and-materials pricing کا استعمال جب مارکیٹ outcome-based models کی طرف منتقل ہو چکی ہے

body_segments.original: Trying to sell alone without a partnership ecosystem for credibility
body_segments.translated: credibility کے لیے partnership ecosystem کے بغیر تنہا بیچنے کی کوشش کرنا

body_segments.original: Connections
body_segments.translated: کنکشنز

body_segments.original: **Builds on**: Lesson 6 (competitive positioning with Snakes and Ladders framework; monetization models)
body_segments.translated: **بنیاد**: سبق 6 (Snakes and Ladders framework کے ساتھ مسابقتی پوزیشننگ؛ monetization models)

body_segments.original: **Leads to**: Chapter Quiz, then Part 2 applied workflows where you'll build what you sell
body_segments.translated: **راستہ**: Chapter Quiz، پھر Part 2 applied workflows جہاں آپ جو بیچتے ہیں اسے بنائیں گے
